title: athyrium × shikoku-montanum
intro: Athyrium × shikoku-montanum, a sterile hybrid fern, is a unique species resulting from the cross between Athyrium yokoscense and A. niponicum. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and phenolic compounds in its extracts. The health benefits of Athyrium × shikoku-montanum include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory agent, antioxidant, and antimicrobial, which may aid in treating various conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts are used in the form of capsules, tablets, or topical creams for therapeutic purposes.
